extensions.description: An array of extensions that should be installed into the container. A minus '-' in front of the extension id removes it from the list of extensions to be installed.

settings.description: Machine specific settings that should be copied into the container. These are only copied when connecting to the container for the first time, rebuilding the container then triggers it again.

devPort.description: The port VS Code can use to connect to its backend.

workspaceFile.description: Path to a .code-workspace file to open instead of the workspaceFolder. Relative paths are resolved against the workspaceFolder. If the file does not exist, VS Code falls back to opening the workspaceFolder with a warning.
